name: Claude Code Skills & Agent Plugins
description: A comprehensive collection of 232+ code skills and agent plugins designed to extend and enhance the functionality of Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and eight other coding agents across domains such as engineering, marketing, product management, compliance, and C-level advisory.

inputs.name: code_snippet
inputs.description: Source code or programming-related input for analysis or transformation.

inputs.name: agent_command
inputs.description: Command or query directed at an AI coding agent.

inputs.name: context_data
inputs.description: Contextual information relevant to the skill or agent plugin operation, such as project details or user goals.

outputs.name: skill_response
outputs.description: Textual output generated by a skill or agent plugin, including code completions, recommendations, or advisory insights.

outputs.name: execution_result
outputs.description: Structured result from the execution of a plugin or agent skill, for example, code diagnostics or compliance checks.

patterns: Modular skill and plugin design to support multiple AI coding agents
Cross-domain advisory and automation integration (engineering, marketing, compliance, product, C-level)
Contextual input processing for enhanced AI agent responses
Plug-and-play capability augmentation for CLI and code editor environments
steps: Identify the target AI coding agent and the related skill or plugin to invoke
Provide the necessary inputs such as code snippets, commands, and context data
Execute the skill/plugin through the designated AI agent interface
Receive and parse the skill output or generated response
Integrate or apply the output for coding assistance, marketing, compliance analysis, or executive advisory
use_cases: Enhancing coding workflows with advanced AI skills across multiple programming agents
Automating compliance checks and product advisory through AI plugins
Providing marketing and C-level strategic insights via AI-driven agent interactions
Augmenting command-line interface tools with AI-powered code and analysis capabilities

prompt_templates.name: code_assist_prompt
agent_command_prompt
prompt_templates.template:
Execute this command using the {agent_name} coding agent:

{agent_command}

prompt_templates.name: domain_advisory_prompt
prompt_templates.template:
As a {domain_expert}, provide recommendations based on the input:

{input_data}
